tasks.q: I don't have a car. I wish I ___ a car.
If only I ___ (study) harder for the exam yesterday!
Order the words: you / making / I / stop / wish / would / that / noise.
tasks.a: I wish you would stop making that noise.

tasks.q: I am not tall. I wish I ___ taller.
If only we ___ the map! We are lost now.
I wish it ___ (stop) raining! I want to go for a walk.
Order the words: only / knew / the / answer / If / I.
tasks.a: If only I knew the answer.

tasks.q: I ate too much cake. I wish I ___ eaten so much. (1 word)
I wish my neighbors ___ play loud music at night.
I can't swim. I wish I ___ swim.
Order: I wish I could retake it. / I failed my test. / If only I had prepared better.
tasks.a: I failed my test. If only I had prepared better. I wish I could retake it.

tasks.q: I have to work tomorrow. I wish I ___ have to work.
